title: Cuneiform Tablet #0376: Ur III Tax Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a tax record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a tax record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Tax Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records tax record matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
